revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月10日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[長久]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1040年]][[12月16日]]） - 長久に改元 * [[享保]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1730年]][[12月19日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]が、次男・[[徳川宗武|宗武]]を立てて[[田安家]]を創設 * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月12日]]） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[鉄道]]建設計画を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[12月22日]]） - [[斉藤きち]]（唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]の侍姜（+ [[1890年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[12月4日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（* [[1623年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月9日 (旧暦)|11月9日]] 翌日[[11月11日 (旧暦)|11月11日]] - 前月[[10月10日 (旧暦)|10月10日]] 翌月[[12月10日 (旧暦)|12月10日]] *新暦[[11月10日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月10日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつとおか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[長久]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1040年]][[12月16日]]） - [[長暦]]より長久に[[改元]] <!---* [[享保]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1730年]][[12月19日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]が、次男・[[徳川宗武|宗武]]を立てて[[田安家]]を創設---「[[徳川宗武]]」では"享保16年(1731年)1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月12日]]） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[鉄道]]建設計画を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[12月22日]]） - [[斉藤きち]]（唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]の侍姜（+ [[1890年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[12月4日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（* [[1623年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == {{節スタブ|date=2023年5月}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|9|11|11|10|10|12|11|1110}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 忌日 == * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[12月4日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（* [[1623年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == {{節スタブ|date=2023年5月}}

{{Lunar November}} '''Lunar November10日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつとおか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の10日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[長久]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1040年]][[12月16日]]） - [[長暦]]より長久に[[改元]] <!---* [[享保]]15年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1730年]][[12月19日]]） - [[徳川吉宗]]が、次男・[[徳川宗武|宗武]]を立てて[[田安家]]を創設---「[[徳川宗武]]」では"享保16年(1731年)1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[12月12日]]） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[鉄道]]建設計画を決定
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1841年]][[12月22日]]） - [[斉藤きち]]（唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]]の侍姜（+ [[1890年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[12月4日]]） - [[明正天皇]]、109代[[天皇]]（* [[1623年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 == {{節スタブ|date=2023年5月}}
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|9|11|11|10|10|12|11|1110}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar November]]

Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
trying to comment out all the bad overview sections I made earlier
adding these as a part 1 of a few steps to get names on the things
removing this thing that kills the comment

I think this is the glitch source

removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder

revision.text:
[[sn:November 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初十]] [[zh:十一月初十]] [[en:draft:November 10 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1040]] [[12月16日]] ） - {{ill|Chōryaku|ja|長暦}} より長久に[[改元]] <!--「[[徳川宗武]] 」では"享保16年(1731年)1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[12月12日]] ） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[鉄道]] 建設計画を決定
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[12月22日]] ） - [[斉藤きち]] （唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]] の侍姜（+ [[1890]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[12月4日]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[天皇]] （* [[1623]] ）
== Commemorations == {{節スタブ|date=2023年5月}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|9|11|11|10|10|12|11|1110}}

[[sn:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初十]] [[zh:十一月初十]] [[en:draft:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1040]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōryaku|ja|長暦}} より長久に[[改元]] <!--「[[徳川宗武]] 」では"享保16年(1731年)1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[December 12]] ） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[鉄道]] 建設計画を決定
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[December 22]] ） - [[斉藤きち]] （唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]] の侍姜（+ [[1890]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[December 4]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[天皇]] （* [[1623]] ）
== Commemorations == {{節スタブ|date=2023年5月}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[December 22]] ） - [[斉藤きち]] （唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]] の侍姜（+ [[1890]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[December 4]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1623]] ）

[[sn:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初十]] [[zh:十一月初十]] [[en:draft:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1040]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōryaku|ja|長暦}} より長久に[[改元]] <!--「[[徳川宗武]] 」では"享保16年(1731年)1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[December 12]] ） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[Railway]] 建設計画を決定
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[December 22]] ） - [[斉藤きち]] （唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]] の侍姜（+ [[1890]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[December 4]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1623]] ）
== Commemorations == {{節スタブ|date=2023年5月}} == See Also! ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1040]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōryaku|ja|長暦}} より長久に[[改元]] <!--「[[徳川宗武]] 」では"享保16th year (1731st year )1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[December 12]] ） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[Railway]] 建設計画を決定
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[December 22]] ） - [[斉藤きち]] （唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[タウンゼント・ハリス|ハリス]] の侍姜（+ [[1890]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[December 4]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1623]] ）

[[sn:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初十]] [[zh:十一月初十]] [[en:draft:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1040]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōryaku|ja|長暦}} より長久に[[改元]] <!--「[[徳川宗武]] 」では"享保16th year (1731st year )1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[December 12]] ） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[Railway]] 建設計画を決定
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[December 22]] ） - [[斉藤きち]] （唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[Townsend Harris|ハリス]] の侍姜（+ [[1890]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[December 4]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1623]] ）
== Commemorations == {{節スタブ|date=2023rd year 5月}}
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 10일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初十]] [[zh:十一月初十]] [[en:draft:November 10 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1040]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōryaku|ja|長暦}} より長久に[[改元]] <!--「[[徳川宗武]] 」では"享保16th year (1731st year )1月27日"・・・"田安徳川家を創設"と記載---> * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[December 12]] ） - 東京～京都の幹線、東京～横浜・京都～神戸・琵琶湖畔～敦賀の3支線の[[Railway]] 建設計画を決定
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1841]] [[December 22]] ） - [[斉藤きち]] （唐人お吉）、駐日総領事[[Townsend Harris|ハリス]] の侍姜（+ [[1890]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[December 4]] ） - [[明正天皇]] 、109代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[1623]] ）
== Commemorations == {{節スタブ|date=2023rd year 5月}}
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|9|11|11|10|10|12|11|1110}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初十]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Chōkyū era ({{ill|Julian calendar}} [[1040]] {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日}}) – the era name was changed to Chōkyū from Chōryaku. * In the 2nd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1869]] {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – a construction plan was decided for three railway branches: the main line connecting Tokyo and Kyoto, a line from Tokyo to Yokohama, another from Kyoto to Kobe, and a branch along Lake Biwa to Tsuruga.
== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1841]] {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|12=draft}} in Japan (died [[1890]]).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1696]] {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}}) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[1623]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- (None) -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|9|11|11|10|10|12|11|1110}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初十]]

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Chōkyū era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|儒略曆|fr|Calendrier_julien|es|Calendario_juliano}} [[1040]] {{ill|December 16|ja|12月16日|12=draft}}) – the era name was changed to Chōkyū from Chōryaku. * In the 2nd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1869]] {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}}) – a construction plan was decided for three railway branches: the main line connecting Tokyo and Kyoto, a line from Tokyo to Yokohama, another from Kyoto to Kobe, and a branch along Lake Biwa to Tsuruga.
== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1841]] {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日|12=draft}}) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|12=draft|12=draft}} in Japan (died [[1890]]).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar}} [[1696]] {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日|12=draft}}) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[1623]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- (None) -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|9|11|11|10|10|12|11|1110}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|November 10|qq=November 10}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Chōkyū era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1040|1040]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – the era name was changed to Chōkyū from Chōryaku. * In the 2nd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – a construction plan was decided for three railway branches: the main line connecting Tokyo and Kyoto, a line from Tokyo to Yokohama, another from Kyoto to Kobe, and a branch along Lake Biwa to Tsuruga.
== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Japan (died [[:en:1890|1890]]).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1623|1623]]).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|9|11|11|10|10|12|11|1110|qq=}}

== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|ja|Townsend Harris|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Japan (died [[:en:1890|1890]]).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1623|1623]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Chōkyū era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1040|1040]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – the era name was changed to Chōkyū from Chōryaku. * In the 2nd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – a construction plan was decided for three railway branches: the main line connecting Tokyo and Kyoto, a line from Tokyo to Yokohama, another from Kyoto to Kobe, and a branch along Lake Biwa to Tsuruga.
== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} in Japan (died [[:en:1890|1890]]).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1623|1623]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初十]][[zh:十一月初十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840209]] Wikidata name: 10th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 10|qq=November 10}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Chōkyū era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1040|1040]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – the era name was changed to Chōkyū from Chōryaku. * In the 2nd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – a construction plan was decided for three railway branches: the main line connecting Tokyo and Kyoto, a line from Tokyo to Yokohama, another from Kyoto to Kobe, and a branch along Lake Biwa to Tsuruga.
== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} in Japan (died [[:en:1890|1890]]).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1623|1623]]).
== Commemorations ==

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1623|1623]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Chōkyū era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1040|1040]] [[:en:December 16|December 16]]) – the era name was changed to Chōkyū from Chōryaku. * In the 2nd year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]]) – a construction plan was decided for three railway branches: the main line connecting Tokyo and Kyoto, a line from Tokyo to Yokohama, another from Kyoto to Kobe, and a branch along Lake Biwa to Tsuruga.
== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]]) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} in Japan (died [[:en:1890|1890]]).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]]) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1623|1623]]).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 10''' is the 10th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Chōkyū era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1040|en|1040|WD=Q19342|lt=1040|1=1040}} {{ill|December 16|en|December 16|WD=Q2410|lt=December 16|1=December 16}}) – the era name was changed to Chōkyū from Chōryaku. * In the 2nd year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12|1=December 12}}) – a construction plan was decided for three railway branches: the main line connecting Tokyo and Kyoto, a line from Tokyo to Yokohama, another from Kyoto to Kobe, and a branch along Lake Biwa to Tsuruga.
== Births == * In the 12th year of the Tenpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|December 22|en|December 22|WD=Q2636|lt=December 22|1=December 22}}) – Saitō Kichi (also known as Tangren Okichi), a samurai serving under Consul General {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q610626}} in Japan (died {{ill|1890|en|1890|WD=Q7832|lt=1890|1=1890}}).
== Deaths == * In the 9th year of the Genroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696|1=1696}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4|1=December 4}}) – Emperor Meishō, the 109th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1623|en|1623|WD=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}}).
